pkgmetadata.longdescription: libayatana-appindicator-glib is the GLib-2.0-only reimplementation of the Ayatana Application Indicators library. It allows applications to export their menus into a system tray / indicator area over DBus, without depending on any GTK widget toolkit. This variant ships the core shared library, GObject introspection data and Vala bindings.

use.flag: Build and run the upstream test suite (requires dbus-test-runner)
